judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to set page owner metadata (saving stack trace, updating handle, incrementing stack record count) for memory tracking/debugging. It does not manage a reference count on a critical variable; the inc_stack_record_count call is for internal bookkeeping, not for reference-count lifecycle management.
